title: SNC Announces Digital Delivery
summary: Sitnasuak Native Corporation (SNC) is excited to share that it is moving to an environmentally friendly method of distributing the Annual Meeting materials, at the same time reducing costs of printing and mailing, and potentially passing on the savings to Shareholders. In past years, SNC mailed a large packet of Annual Meeting materials that contains an annual report, a m...

title: Survival and peril on the edge of a warming world
summary: “The Loneliest Polar Bear” is the heartbreaking but ultimately hopeful story of an abandoned polar bear cub named Nora and the humans working tirelessly to save her and her species from an accelerating climate crisis. Written by Kale Williams , a reporter at The Oregonian/OregonLive covering science...

title: USDA to gather new data on certified organic agriculture production
summary: The U.S. Department of Agriculture’s (USDA) National Agricultural Statistics Service (NASS) is conducting the 2021 Organic Survey to gather new data on certified organic crops and livestock commodities in the United States. title: Electric and eclectic.
summary: New releases and some music you may have missed. We spin the wheel and discover something cool about that ancient bar in Spenard.
